description: Capability for the main window. Webview permissions are used by the WebLinks tab to render fully interactive previews in a native Tauri Webview overlay. The `source-fetcher-*` windows are the Cloudflare pass-through windows created by `add_source_via_webview`; they need `core:event:allow-emit` to send the captured JSON + cancel signal back to Rust via Tauri events.
